title: Hody Watches from the Shadows
description: On pages 16–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Jinbe. The core beat is hody watches from the shadows.
scene: The scene follows hody watches from the shadows, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Jinbe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OTOHIME ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Have faith!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Both in me, the wife whom you chose...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...and in the humans ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Such impu- dance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: night after night of sleepless unease..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...wacked the entire ryluguu kingdom....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will be all right!! Cheer up, all of you!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Boss Jinbe! Is there any news of the Queen?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must wait patiently and believe in her...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And after a week that felt like many months...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish we could hear her speeches again...

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Queen Otohime has returned !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: After negotiations that spanned many days ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OTOHIME HAD FINALLY BEEN ABLE TO PACIFY THE TENTAYUBITO IN

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank goodness you're alive!!! That alone is enough!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Welcome home, your majesty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the piece of paper that Otohime held in her hand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was a shining ray of hope for all of fish-man island.

summary: Hody Watches from the Shadows. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
